text.title: Provider Deprecation Runbook Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Claude Opus 3.x → 4.7 deprecation for the support-bot.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: Faion ML-engineering. Provider notice: Anthropic deprecates `claude-opus-3-5` on 2026-09-01. Replacement: `claude-opus-4-7`. Eval baseline: CSAT-positive 0.62.
Phase 1 — announce (2026-05-22): owner=ruslan@faion.net, on_call=ml-oncall-rotation, replacement config drafted.
Phase 2 — canary-1pct (2026-06-15, 60 min): 1% traffic flipped. Observed error_rate=0.31% (baseline 0.34%), eval_delta=+0.4 pp. Continue.
Phase 3 — ramp-5pct (2026-07-01, 240 min): 5% traffic. Error 0.29%, delta +0.6 pp. Continue.
Phase 4 — ramp-50pct (2026-08-01, 720 min): 50% traffic. Error 0.30%, delta +0.5 pp. Continue.
Phase 5 — cutover (2026-08-25, 240 min): 100% traffic. Run-record committed:
Result. Migration complete 7 days before deprecation date. No incidents. Runbook reviewed quarterly.
